allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m['name']\) for m in d.get\('models',[]\)]")

Bash(curl -s -X POST -H 'Authorization: Bearer div_sk_1c84295d04e1c916009c2f6d637b3cd7474d4163defa3dc175d845c30dca8d6a' -H 'X-Machine-Identity: tailscale:gg-macstudio' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"invoke","params":{"context":{"tenantId":"alpha-capital"},"data":{"content":{"capability":"markets/predictions"}}}}' http://localhost:7100/a2a)

Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c "select count\(*\) from prediction.market_analysts; select count\(*\) from prediction.market_instrument_analyst_assignments; select i.symbol, count\(ia.analyst_id\) as analysts from prediction.market_instruments i left join prediction.market_instrument_analyst_assignments ia on ia.instrument_id = i.id group by i.symbol order by i.symbol limit 20;")

Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c "select column_name from information_schema.columns where table_schema='prediction' and table_name='market_analysts' and column_name='is_enabled';")
Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c "select report_type, report_date, summary from prediction.learning_reports order by created_at desc limit 5;")

Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c "select count\(*\) as total_predictions, count\(*\) filter \(where created_at < now\(\) - interval '24 hours'\) as eligible_predictions from prediction.market_predictions;" -c "select count\(*\) from prediction.market_run_evaluations;")

Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c "select date_trunc\('day', created_at\) as day, count\(*\), min\(role\), max\(role\) from prediction.market_predictions group by 1 order by 1 desc limit 15;")

Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c "select count\(*\) from prediction.market_predictions mp where mp.created_at <= now\(\) - interval '1 days' and mp.created_at >= now\(\) - interval '2 days' and mp.role in \('analyst','arbitrator'\);" -c "select count\(*\) from prediction.market_predictions mp where mp.created_at <= now\(\) - interval '3 days' and mp.created_at >= now\(\) - interval '4 days' and mp.role in \('analyst','arbitrator'\);" -c "select default_evaluation_horizons, horizon_unit from prediction.universes where is_active = true;")
Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c "\\d prediction.test_price_data" -c "select count\(*\), min\(timestamp\), max\(timestamp\) from prediction.test_price_data;")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); bars=r.get\('results',[]\); print\('count:', len\(bars\)\); [print\(__import__\('datetime'\).datetime.utcfromtimestamp\(b['t']/1000\).strftime\('%Y-%m-%d'\), 'close=', b['c']\) for b in bars]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('status:',r.get\('status'\),'count:', len\(r.get\('results',[]\)\)\); [print\(__import__\('datetime'\).datetime.utcfromtimestamp\(b['t']/1000\).strftime\('%Y-%m-%d'\), 'close=', b['c']\) for b in r.get\('results',[]\)[:15]]")
Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c "select report_type, summary from prediction.learning_reports order by created_at desc limit 1;")
Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c "select report_type, report_date, count\(*\) from prediction.learning_reports group by 1,2 order by 2 desc, 1;")

Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c "select date_trunc\('day',created_at\) as day, count\(distinct run_id\) as runs, count\(*\) as predictions from prediction.market_predictions group by 1 order by 1 desc;")

Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c "select count\(*\) as total_active, round\(avg\(relevance_score\)::numeric,2\) as avg_relevance, round\(max\(relevance_score\)::numeric,2\) as max_relevance, round\(min\(relevance_score\)::numeric,2\) as min_relevance from prediction.market_predictors where status='active';" -c "select count\(distinct instrument_id\) as instruments_with_signal_above_3 from prediction.market_predictors where status='active' group by instrument_id having sum\(relevance_score\) >= 3.0;")
